title: Phantom Jammer
description: This mod adds a Phantom Jammer that will help you kill phantoms automatically
body:
# Review
This mod introduces a special block designed to help players eliminate pesky phantoms. The block actively pulls nearby phantoms within a **20-block** radius towards itself and strikes them with lightning. Itspowerful ability makes dealing with these airborne nuisances easier, offering a creative solution for players tired of being harassed by phantoms. Whether you're out exploring or defending your base, this block is the perfect addition to keep the skies clear of threats.

![Phantom Jammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3932eff66e21cce7a46e0c73e48162704b52cbd3.png)
